entries.title: Embedded + Full Stack Engineer
bullets: Built robust modular embedded boards and deterministic control firmware.
Developed a PWA IDE for real-time control workflows.
Delivered a prosthetic hand precision-control demonstration.

entries.title: Research Contributor
bullets: Explored vector-field model approaches for strict artifact budgets.
Prepared experiments for 8xH100 constrained training windows.
Designed low-power benchmarking plans on Raspberry Pi 5.

entries.title: Systems Builder
bullets: Created monocraft-matrix for visual serial/network stress testing.
Applied sci-fi rendering aesthetics using custom Monocraft glyphs.
Bridged embedded systems, AI experimentation, and product UX.
